name: Summer Apple Salad
recipeIngredient: 2 large apples; unpeeled and finely chopped (about 2-1/2 cups)
recipeInstructions:
1. Soften gelatin in cold water; stir well.
2. Add sugar and salt to the softened gelatin mixture.
3. Gradually add boiling water while stirring until the gelatin is fully dissolved.
4. Stir in vinegar and lime juice.
5. Chill until it reaches the consistency of an unbeaten egg white.
6. Gently fold in the apple, green onion, and green pepper into the chilled mixture.
7. Spoon the mixture into 12 individual molds (1/2 cup each) and chill until set.
8. Unmold on a lettuce-lined plate.
9. Garnish with apple wedges if desired.
SOURCE: Southern Living Magazine, July, 1980.
